title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-3:kernel-workspace:3873:run:20260401T130014:10985 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kern...
summary_text: 以下、外部参照（X投稿）を取り込む際に、このリポ契約を壊しやすいポイントとガードレールです。 - **Risk 1: 適用先の取り違え（現行FUGUE契約 vs Kernel設計）** Guardrail: まず「今の本番運用を変えるのか」「Kernel設計側を更新するのか」を固定し、前者は `AGENTS.md` を優先、後者は Kernel docs を優先。混在させない。 Sources: [AGENTS.md#L7](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/AGENTS.md#L7), [AGENTS.md#L14](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/AGENTS.md#L14), [CODEX.md#L8](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L8) - **Risk 2: 外部アイデアを“Kernel名義”で単一Codex作業として進める** Guardrail: 非自明作業は Kernel 形（6 lanes + `codex+glm+specialist`）で進め、満たせない場合は fail-closed。`degraded-allowed` は glm同一run2回失敗後のみ。 Sources: [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L24), [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L26](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L26), [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L34](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L34), [CODEX.md#L112](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L112) - **Risk 3: “外部投稿の要旨”を根拠なしで仕様化する** Guardrail: source-grounded入力は先に直接引用を抽出し、その引用だけで判断。主張系の最終回答は出典照合してunsupported claimを削除。 Sources: [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L44](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L44), [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L55](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L55) - **Risk 4: 文書更新だけで“実装済み”扱いにする** Guardrail: ルール変更は必ず runtime/guard 実装 + receipt/health 証跡 + regression test まで揃える。 Sources: [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L56), [CODEX.md#L36](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L36), [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L264](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L264) - **Risk 5: 受け入れ証跡の欠落（見かけ上は動いても runtime health が invalid）** Guardrail: bootstrap receipt に `active_models` / `manifest_lane_count` / `agent/subagent labels` を必ず記録し、provider success evidence を残す。 Sources: [scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L24), [scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L54](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh#L54), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L179](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L179), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L190](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L190), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L216](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L216) - **Risk 6: specialist/GLM運用の契約違反（手動起動や誤計上）** Guardrail: specialist は `kgemini|kcursor|kcopilot`、GLM は `kglm` を優先し、手動計上は `codex-kernel-guard budget-consume`。 Sources: [CODEX.md#L119](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L119), [CODEX.md#L120](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L120), [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L74](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L74), [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L775](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh#L775) - **Risk 7: 外部参照適用のついでに GitHub/CI へ越境操作する** Guardrail: 明示依頼がない限り GitHub投稿・CI確認はしない。非criticalはローカル `/vote` 合議を使う。 Sources: [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L10), [.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L114](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L114), [CODEX.md#L164](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md#L164) - **Risk 8: Hybrid境界違反（Codex側でClaude専用MCPを扱う）** Guardrail: Hybrid時の MCP は Claude 専有。Codex側へ橋渡ししない。 Sources: [AGENTS.md#L40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/AGENTS.md#L40) 以上が verification/review 観点での最重要リスク。
